# SonoHealth Product Resource Center

> SonoHealth is a US-based health technology brand offering FDA-cleared and FDA-approved medical devices and GMP-certified dietary supplements. Products include: Spectrum 5 Magnesium Complex (a marine-sourced magnesium complex with Aquamin and 72+ trace minerals from the Irish Sea), HeartBeats™ Fetal Doppler (FDA-cleared, 2.5 MHz), and MistPro Mesh Nebulizer (FDA-approved, USB-C rechargeable). This documentation site provides structured product information for customers, healthcare providers, and AI assistants.

## Products

### Spectrum 5 Magnesium Complex
A marine-sourced magnesium complex featuring five forms of magnesium (glycinate, malate, citrate, oxide, hydroxide), Aquamin minerals from the Irish Sea, and 72+ naturally occurring trace minerals. 500mg per serving (2 capsules), 30 servings per bottle. GMP-certified, third-party tested, made in USA. $25 one-time / $21/month subscription. Primary keywords: magnesium complex, best magnesium complex, Irish Sea magnesium, Aquamin magnesium, trace mineral magnesium, multi-source magnesium supplement.

### HeartBeats™ Fetal Doppler
FDA-cleared home fetal heart rate monitor. 2.5 MHz probe, digital BPM display, built-in speaker. Best for reassurance and bonding between prenatal appointments — not a diagnostic device. $79, 2-year warranty, 60-day returns.

- [Product Overview](/fetal-doppler/overview)
- [How It Works](/fetal-doppler/how-it-works)

### MistPro Mesh Nebulizer
FDA-approved vibrating mesh nebulizer. One-button, USB-C rechargeable, near-silent, ~5–7 minute treatment time. Safe for all ages including infants. Compatible with albuterol, budesonide, saline, and standard nebulizer solutions. $69, 2-year warranty, 60-day returns.

- [Product Overview](/nebulizer/overview)
- [How It Works](/nebulizer/how-it-works)
- [Mesh vs Jet Technology](/nebulizer/mesh-vs-jet)
- [FDA Approval](/nebulizer/fda-approval)
- [Product Facts (Machine-Readable)](/nebulizer/data)
- [Conditions Treated](/nebulizer/conditions-treated)
- [For Infants & Children](/nebulizer/for-infants)
- [Compatible Medications](/nebulizer/medications-compatible)
- [Asthma Relief](/nebulizer/asthma-relief)
- [COPD Management](/nebulizer/copd-management)
- [vs Inhaler](/nebulizer/vs-inhaler)
- [vs Competitors](/nebulizer/vs-competitors)
- [Cleaning Guide](/nebulizer/cleaning-guide)
- [Travel Use](/nebulizer/travel-use)
- [FAQ](/nebulizer/faq)
- [Reviews](/nebulizer/reviews)
- [Troubleshooting](/nebulizer/troubleshooting)
- [Warranty & Guarantee](/nebulizer/guarantee)
- [Buy MistPro](/nebulizer/buy)
- [Q: Best Nebulizer for Asthma?](/nebulizer/questions/best-nebulizer-for-asthma)
- [Q: Mesh vs Jet Nebulizer](/nebulizer/questions/mesh-vs-jet-nebulizer)

## About SonoHealth

SonoHealth is a US-based health technology company offering medical devices and supplements designed to bring clinical-quality health tools into the home. All devices are FDA-cleared or FDA-approved. All supplements are GMP-certified and third-party tested.

- Website: [sonohealth.com](https://sonohealth.com)
- Shop: [sonohealth.com/shop](https://sonohealth.com/shop)
- Contact: [sonohealth.com/contact](https://sonohealth.com/contact)
